controls.title: Linux VMs must disable password authentication
controls.description: Linux virtual machines must use SSH keys instead of password authentication.
controls.remediation: Set disable_password_authentication = true and configure admin_ssh_key.

controls.title: Virtual machines should enable encryption at host
controls.description: Temporary disks, caches, and data flows between compute and storage should be encrypted at the host.
controls.remediation: Set encryption_at_host_enabled = true on supported VM sizes.

controls.title: Virtual machines must enable Secure Boot
controls.description: Generation 2 virtual machines must use Trusted Launch Secure Boot.
controls.remediation: Use a Trusted Launch compatible image and set secure_boot_enabled = true.

controls.title: Virtual machines must enable virtual TPM
controls.description: Generation 2 virtual machines must use a virtual Trusted Platform Module.
controls.remediation: Use a Trusted Launch compatible image and set vtpm_enabled = true.

controls.title: Windows VMs must enable automatic updates
controls.description: Windows virtual machines must receive operating-system security updates.
controls.remediation: Set automatic_updates_enabled = true and use an approved patch mode.

controls.title: Windows VMs should use platform-managed patching
controls.description: Azure platform-managed patch orchestration should maintain Windows security updates.

controls.title: Linux VMs should use platform-managed patching
controls.description: Azure platform-managed patch orchestration should maintain Linux security updates.
